apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of Dharma to explain the social hierarchy and relationships in ancient Indian society.
Students will be able to use the information on the role of women in ancient Indian society to understand the changing status of women over time.
Students will be able to analyze the influence of Vedic and Buddhist traditions on the cultural landscape of ancient India and explain its impact on society.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the similarities and differences between the Vedic and Buddhist traditions and their impact on the cultural landscape of ancient India.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of cultural traditions in shaping the social and economic institutions of ancient Indian society.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of cultural traditions on the status of women in ancient Indian society.
remember: Students will be able to recall the major cultural traditions in ancient India.
Students will be able to identify the different stages of cultural development in ancient India.
Students will be able to list the important cultural institutions of ancient India such as the Varnashrama and the Ashramas.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of Dharma and its significance in ancient Indian society.
Students will be able to describe the role of women in ancient Indian society and their changing status over time.
Students will be able to analyze the influence of Vedic and Buddhist traditions on the cultural landscape of ancient India.

ncert_objectives: To understand the various stages of cultural development in ancient India and their impact on society.
To analyze the role of Dharma in shaping the social and economic institutions of ancient Indian society.
To evaluate the influence of Vedic and Buddhist traditions on the cultural landscape of ancient India and its impact on society.
board_exam_objectives: To identify the different stages of cultural development in ancient India and explain their impact on society.
To describe the role of women in ancient Indian society and explain their changing status over time.
To analyze the influence of cultural traditions on the status of women in ancient Indian society and explain its impact on society.
